meta.title: MojiCap — Copy & Paste Emojis, Symbols & Fancy Text
meta.description: The fastest and most beautiful emoji tool on the web. Copy and paste emojis, special symbols, fancy text, and emoji combos instantly.

nav.bookmarkTip: or drag to Bookmarks to save ✨

home.heroSubtitle: The fastest emoji, symbols, and fancy text tool on the web.
home.invisibleHint: Use to bypass filters or create blank names in games.

faq.a: MojiCap is a completely free, lightning-fast platform that allows you to instantly copy and paste emojis, special symbols, text art, and fancy fonts to any device or application.

faq.q: Do I need to download an app or keyboard?
faq.a: No! MojiCap works entirely in your browser. There is no software to install or sign-up required. Just tap to copy.

faq.q: Are these emojis free to use?
faq.a: Yes, 100% free! You can use everything you copy from our site on Instagram, Twitter, TikTok, Discord, and messaging apps.

emoji.title: Emoji Copy & Paste
emoji.metaDesc: Browse and copy all 3,700+ emojis including skin tone variants. Full Unicode 16.0 support.
emoji.clickToCopy: Click any emoji to copy it to your clipboard.

faq.q: How do I copy these emojis?
faq.a: Simply click on any emoji you like, and it will be instantly copied to your clipboard. You can then paste it anywhere!

faq.q: Do these emojis work on all devices?
faq.a: Yes, our emojis use standard Unicode 16.0 characters, which are supported across iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and most major social platforms.

faq.q: How do I search for a specific emoji?
faq.a: Use the search bar at the top of the emoji list to find exactly what you are looking for using keywords or shortcodes.

symbols.title: Special Symbols & Characters
symbols.metaTitle: Special Symbols — Copy & Paste 1,800+ Unicode Symbols
symbols.metaDesc: Copy and paste 1,800+ special symbols including arrows, stars, math symbols, and more.
symbols.clickToCopy: Click to copy any symbol to clipboard.

faq.a: Special symbols are Unicode characters like stars (★), arrows (→), and math operators (∑) that are not typically found on a standard keyboard.

faq.q: Can I use these symbols in my bio or username?
faq.a: Absolutely! These special text symbols are perfect for decorating your Instagram bio, Twitter name, Discord status, or in-game nicknames.

faq.q: Are these symbols images or text?
faq.a: They are 100% plain text characters. This means you can copy and paste them into any text field, document, or messaging app.

fancyText.title: Fancy Text Generator
fancyText.metaTitle: Fancy Text Generator (𝓬𝓸𝓹𝔂 𝖆𝖓𝖉 𝓹𝓪𝓼𝓽𝓮) — 20+ Cool Fonts
fancyText.metaDesc: Transform your normal text into cool, aesthetic, and fancy fonts. 𝓬𝓸𝓹𝔂 𝖆𝖓𝖉 𝓹𝓪𝓼𝓽𝓮 to Instagram, TikTok, Discord, and Twitter instantly. 20+ styles including cursive, bold, and italic.

faq.q: How does the fancy text generator work?
faq.a: It converts your normal text into mathematical alphanumeric symbols that look like different fonts (such as cursive or gothic), but are actually just special Unicode characters.

faq.q: Can I use fancy text on Instagram?
faq.a: Yes! Many Instagram users use our fancy text tool to make their bio stand out using bold, italic, or cursive text.

faq.q: Is the generated text readable by screen readers?
faq.a: While most modern screen readers can interpret standard unicode characters, heavy use of mathematical fancy text might be difficult for accessibility. Use it creatively but sparingly.

sections.title: Generating Fancy Text
paragraphs: So perhaps you've generated some fancy text and are ready to copy and paste it into the comments section of funny cat videos or your Instagram bio. But perhaps you're wondering how it's even possible to change the font of your text? Is it some sort of hack? Are you copying and pasting an actual font?

The answer is actually no—rather than generating fancy fonts, this converter creates fancy symbols. The explanation starts with Unicode, an industry standard that specifies thousands of different symbols and characters. All the text you see on your electronic devices is likely specified by the Unicode standard.

sections.title: Font Generator (Text Symbols Using Unicode)
paragraphs: Among the hundreds of thousands of symbols in the Unicode specifications are characters that resemble or are variations of the standard alphabet. For example, we can take the word "hello" and convert its characters into the fancy letters "𝖍𝖊𝖑𝖑𝖔", which are simply a set of specific Unicode symbols.

These sets of fancy letters are scattered throughout the Unicode specification. To create a fancy text translator, it's just a matter of finding these matching letters and linking them to their normal alphabetical equivalents.

sections.title: Copy and Paste
paragraphs: After generating your fancy text symbols, you can easily copy and paste these "fonts" to most websites and apps. You can use it to create a creative-looking Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Tumblr, or Twitter post, or just for sending messages full of beautiful text to your friends.

The only exception is if your paste destination doesn't support certain Unicode characters. In that case, you might see a generic "box" where the browser tries to render a fancy letter. This doesn't mean there's an error with the translator—it just means the website's specific font doesn't support that character.

combos.title: Emoji Combos
combos.metaDesc: Browse and copy 1,100+ emoji combos for your bio, posts, and messages.

faq.a: An emoji combo is a creative combination of multiple standard emojis to convey a specific aesthetic, mood, or idea (like 🎀🌷🫧 for coquette).

faq.q: Where can I use emoji combinations?
faq.a: Emoji combos are incredibly popular on TikTok, Instagram captions, Twitter, and personal blogs to create a distinct visual vibe.

faq.q: Can I copy the entire combo at once?
faq.a: Yes, clicking the copy button next to any combo will instantly copy the entire sequence of emojis to your clipboard.

kaomoji.title: Kaomoji & Japanese Emoticons
kaomoji.metaDesc: Browse and copy 2,000+ kaomoji and Japanese-style emoticons.
kaomoji.searchPlaceholder: Search kaomoji... (e.g. smile, sad, table flip)

faq.a: Kaomoji (顔文字) is a popular Japanese emoticon style made up of Japanese characters and grammar punctuations, used to express emotion in texting and cyber communication.

faq.q: What is the difference between Kaomoji and Emojis?
faq.a: Emojis are graphic symbols and pictures, whereas Kaomoji are text-based ascii art faces that you don't need a special keyboard to type if you copy them here.

faq.q: Do Kaomoji work on Discord and Reddit?
faq.a: Yes, since they are standard text characters, they render perfectly on almost all modern forums, games, and messaging platforms.
